layers.prompt_used: IMAGE 1 is the authoritative NEW PRODUCT. Preserve its exact identity, shape, proportions, colors, materials and details. IMAGE 2 is STYLE-ONLY: borrow palette, lighting, composition rhythm, background treatment and mood, but never copy its product, logo, trademark, text or distinctive props. The final image must feature only IMAGE 1's product. Product: 小米智能手机. Transferable style: dominant_colors: #FFFFFF, #C5A059, #F5F5F5, #333333, #E8DCC4; lighting: Soft, diffused studio lighting with high-key exposure; minimal harsh shadows; bright and airy atmosphere emphasizing clarity and cleanliness.; composition: Centered product display arranged on a virtual shelf; hierarchical layout with top branding/headlines, central visual focus, and bottom action bar; balanced use of negative space.; background: Textured light background resembling white European architectural walls with subtle column and relief patterns; clean, sophisticated, and neutral.; mood: Premium, elegant, professional, trustworthy, sophisticated, high-end skincare aesthetic.; typography: Mix of elegant Serif fonts for main headlines (conveying luxury) and clean Sans-serif fonts for body text and prices (ensuring readability); varied font weights and sizes to establish clear visual hierarchy; gold color used for emphasis on key benefits.; decorative_elements: Gold accent lines and borders, Rounded pill-shaped tags and labels, Dotted connector lines linking text to items, Subtle architectural relief patterns (columns, floral motifs), Distinct block backgrounds for pricing/offer info, Vertical side navigation tab. Create a premium square e-commerce hero main image, strong product focus, clean hierarchy, no copied text or logos.

Create a square selling-point image with clear visual callouts for: ['徕卡光学影像', '独特四圆环镜头模组', '清新配色选择', '极窄边框全面屏']. Use concise original Chinese copy only when legible.

IMAGE 1 is the authoritative NEW PRODUCT. Preserve its exact identity, shape, proportions, colors, materials and details. IMAGE 2 is STYLE-ONLY: borrow palette, lighting, composition rhythm, background treatment and mood, but never copy its product, logo, trademark, text or distinctive props. The final image must feature only IMAGE 1's product. Product: 小米智能手机. Transferable style: dominant_colors: #F7F7F5, #C5A059, #333333, #FFFFFF, #EAE3D6; lighting: Soft, diffuse high-key studio lighting. Even illumination minimizes harsh shadows, emphasizing product clarity and texture. Specular highlights on glass and metallic elements enhance the premium feel.; composition: Horizontal product arrangement with hierarchical sizing (larger items centrally placed, smaller items flanking). Text overlays utilize leader lines and floating badges. Structured vertical hierarchy: brand header at top, product showcase in middle, promotional offers on the right, and a solid call-to-action bar at the bottom.; background: Textured off-white/cream surface resembling a stone plinth or marble shelf. Subtle, low-opacity background features faint architectural molding or classical relief patterns (columns/cornices), suggesting a French or European aesthetic.; mood: Professional, clinical elegance, premium, clean, sophisticated. Evokes a sense of 'salon-grade' or 'dermatological' quality mixed with French luxury.; typography: Elegant Serif typeface for main headlines (conveying tradition and authority). Clean Sans-serif for product descriptions and functional text. Gold and dark grey color palette for text. Clear visual hierarchy with varied font weights.; decorative_elements: Golden rounded rectangular badges, Thin leader lines connecting labels to products, Subtle classical architectural line art (background texture), Solid color bottom banner, Price tags with distinct background blocks. Create a premium square e-commerce hero main image, strong product focus, clean hierarchy, no copied text or logos.

global_style.mood: 参照已上传的参考图风格

description: style_transfer_batch: 用户明确要求“这一个风格啊”，且系统检测到风格参考图已上传，符合风格迁移触发的条件。应使用style_transfer_batch按用户指定的图片类型生成风格一致的套图。
